📊 SAP CDS View Reference

Release status, delta extraction capability, and underlying table mappings for S/4HANA CDS views

High — Well-documented, verified mapping
Medium — Likely correct, may involve multiple tables
Lower — Educated estimate, verify in your system
CDS View Name ↕ Description ↕ Category ↕ Released ↕ Delta Enabled ↕ Primary SAP Table ↕ Confidence ↕
No CDS views match your search. Try different keywords.
⚠️ Based on SAP S/4HANA 2023/2024 releases. Always verify in your system via SE11, Eclipse ADT, or the View Browser app.
Hover any row for additional mapping notes. Confidence reflects mapping certainty — not SAP official documentation status.
